prestazioni: Upgrade the 4.0L twin-turbocharged V8 (engine code: **CAZC**) with a **BorgWarner EFR 9280 turbocharger kit** (hybrid billet wheel, 62mm compressor, 76mm turbine) paired with a **Forge Motorsport Motorsport intercooler** (50% larger core volume, 30% reduced pressure drop) and a **Milltek Sport 304 stainless steel turbo-back exhaust** (3.5" diameter, resonated center section, quad 100mm tips) to eliminate backpressure and optimize spool at 2,200 RPM.

Replace the factory **ZF 8HP95 transmission** valve body with a **Lingenfelter Performance Engineering Stage 3 TCM tune** (aggressive shift logic, 0.15s faster upshifts, launch control at 3,500 RPM) and install a **PTP Turbo Smart dual-port blow-off valve** (dual-stage venting, 30% faster recirculation) to prevent compressor surge under hard deceleration.

Swap the OEM **Continental SportContact 6** tires (285/45 R21) for **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 Connect** (295/40 R22, semi-slick compound, 0.95g lateral grip) mounted on **BBS FI-R forged wheels** (22x10.5 ET35, 12kg per wheel) and pair with **KW Suspensions Variant 5 coilovers** (3-way adjustable damping, 40mm drop, 20% stiffer rebound than OEM air suspension) for track-focused geometry.
estetica: **Vorsteiner V-FF102 carbon fiber widebody kit** (30mm extended fenders, integrated canards, OEM-grade clear coat) with **Rocket Bunny V3 rear diffuser** (dual-layer carbon, 3D-printed vortex generators) and **custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap** (satin finish, 200-micron thickness) for stealth aggression.

**LuxuryTec LED headlight retrofit** (Osram 8000K CBI bulbs, adaptive cornering, 30% brighter than OEM) with **Morimoto XB LED fog lights** (5,000-lumen output, 50W CREE chips) and **custom laser-etched Bentley winged-B badges** (blacked-out, 3M Scotchlite reflective backing) for subtle branding.

**Rotiform LAS-R 22" forged wheels** (split 10-spoke, matte bronze finish, 22x11 ET40 rear) with **Hankook Ventus R-S4** semi-slick tires (325/30 R22, 0.98g lateral grip) and **AP Racing BBK (Big Brake Kit)** (405mm front rotors, 6-piston calipers, two-piece floating design) painted in **Bentley Racing Green** with gold hardware.
